title: Whisper, Chant, Prayer, Awaken
overview: Haruhiro awakens in the world of Grimgar. We follow him and his party as they become Volunteer Soldiers and struggle to earn a living.

title: Long Day of the Trainee Volunteer Soldier
overview: Haruhiro and the others find a goblin they might be able to defeat. Will they finally beat their first monster?

title: Are Goblin Pouches Filled with Our Dreams?
overview: Haruhiro and his party are enjoying their first earnings. They are getting used to life here, but continue to work hard to live.

title: Sky Dancing with Ash
overview: Haruhiro and his party continue to grow stronger and learn new skills, but an unexpected challenge changes everything.

title: Crying Doesn't Mean You're Weak. Enduring Doesn't Mean You're Strong.
overview: Haruhiro and his party are dealing with Manato's death and figuring out what's next. Will they get their party back together to survive?

title: Her Circumstances
overview: Haruhiro and his party are figuring out how to continue fighting without Manato, and we learn about Mary's past.

title: They Were Called Goblin Slayers
overview: Haruhiro and his party now know Mary's past and try to have better teamwork within the party.

title: In My Memories with You
overview: Haruhiro and his party are finally facing the same group of goblins that killed Manato. Will they be able to avenge Manato?

title: How to Rest
overview: Haruhiro and his party take the day off and use this time to rest and prepare for their next challenges.

title: I'm Not Fit to Be a Leader
overview: Haruhiro and his party go into the Cyrene Mine where they encounter kobolds and have to deal with Ranta's lack of cooperation.

title: Between Life and Death
overview: Haruhiro and his party encounter Death Spots and reach the floor where Mary's original party died. Will they be able to get away safely?

title: See You Tomorrow...
overview: Haruhiro and his party are in the Cyrene Mine. Ranta got separated from the party and is fending off kobolds alone. Can they all get out alive?
